creator: acc@hexadecagram.org
text:
I can confirm that bobf's method for replacing ekiga with ekiga3 results
in a successful build on my machine, and gnome's dependency tree is
satisfied after performing this operation.

Doing so required me to replace databases/libiodbc with
databases/unixODBC, however.  Not a huge deal for me, but probably
should also be mentioned in UPDATING.

-- 
Anthony Chavez                                  http://hexadecagram.org/
mailto:acc@hexadecagram.org                    xmpp:acc@hexadecagram.org
